response.text:
The display is showing an eye/jitter analysis layout on Ref 1.

- Plot 1: Eye Diagram for Meas 1, with a clearly open eye and orange/yellow density over green persistence.
- Plot 2: TIE Spectrum for Meas 1, showing several discrete spectral peaks.
- Plot 3: TIE Histogram for Meas 1, with the main distribution clustered near 0 ps and some spread to negative times.
- Plot 4: Bathtub curve for Meas 1, with BER scale on the right.

Top-left measurement table:
- Meas 1 labeled Jitter Summary on Ref 1
- It lists jitter-related results including:
  - DR ≈ 2.5008 Gb/s
  - PL(UI) ≈ 40
  - TIE(o) ≈ -39.045 zs
  - TJ@ ≈ 54.07 ps
  - RJ ≈ 1.6804 ps

Right-side results pane still shows:
- Frequency: mean ≈ 1.106 GHz, sigma ≈ 298.4 MHz
- Meas 4: Rise Time ≈ 145.4 ps
- Meas 5: Fall Time ≈ 220.4 ps
- Meas 6: Amplitude ≈ 744.8 mV
- Meas 7: Peak-to-Peak ≈ 1.104 V
- Meas 8: Peak-to-Peak ≈ 1.104 V

Bottom status:
- Ref 1 at 200 mV/div
- 20 GS/s
- Horizontal 200 ns/div
- Acquisition: Single
- Scope appears Offline in the UI panel

Notably, the screenshot still shows Meas 4 through Meas 8 in the right pane despite the delete commands having returned OK.
